chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-105 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.296/2022 2. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 3. For orders on CMA No.297/2022 4. For hearing of main case 07-06-2022 Mr. Aamir Mustafa Kamario, Advocate for the Petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2 to 4. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks protection against alleged harassment being caused by the respondents No.2, 3 and 4, who are police officials having designations of DIG Sukkur, SSP Sukkur and SHO Police Station Rohri, respectively, on the instance of private respondents Nos.5 to 8. The petitioner has already availed his remedy under Cr.Misc. Application No.360/2022 before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Sukkur, whereby vide order dated 14.02.2022, the official respondents were directed not to harass or humiliate the petitioner. The contention of learned counsel for the petitioner is that despite passing of aforesaid order by the Ex-Officio Justice of peace, the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner at the behest of private respondents. The instant Conational Petition is dismissed being not maintainable as appropriate directions have already been issued by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace concerned, however, in case the petitioner is aggrieved by any excess being committed by the police officials, he may approach to same Ex-Officio Justice of Peace by filing contempt application, which in case is filed, shall be decided by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace in accordance with law. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
